glosses.ja: 侵略する; 侵入する

sentences.target: Les moustiques envahissent le balcon ce soir.
sentences.reading: /le mus.tik ɑ̃.va.is lə bal.kɔ̃ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Les moustiques envahissent le balcon ce soir.
translations.ipa: /le mus.tik ɑ̃.va.is lə bal.kɔ̃ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: Mosquitoes are taking over the balcony tonight.
translations.es: Los mosquitos están invadiendo el balcón esta noche.
translations.de: Heute Abend wimmelt der Balkon von Mücken.
translations.it: Le zanzare stanno invadendo il balcone stasera.
translations.zh-Hans: 今晚阳台上到处都是蚊子。
translations.pt: Os mosquitos estão tomando conta da varanda esta noite.
translations.tr: Sivrisinekler bu akşam balkonu ele geçiriyor.
translations.vi: Muỗi đang chiếm lấy ban công tối nay.
translations.nl: Vanavond wemelt het balkon van de muggen.
translations.hu: Ma este a szúnyogok ellepik az erkélyt.
translations.hi: आज रात मच्छर बालकनी पर छा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Τα κουνούπια κατακλύζουν το μπαλκόνι απόψε.
translations.nb: Myggene tar over balkongen i kveld.
translations.ro: Țânțarii acaparează balconul în seara asta.
translations.cs: Dnes večer je balkon plný komárů.
translations.ja: 今夜はベランダが蚊だらけだ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; introduces the subject noun 'moustiques'.
Common noun, plural; subject of the verb 'envahissent'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; agrees with 'Les moustiques'.
Definite article, singular; introduces the direct object 'balcon'.
Common noun, singular; direct object of 'envahissent'.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'soir'; forms a temporal NP 'ce soir'.
Noun head of the NP 'ce soir'; functions as a temporal adjunct.

translations.es: El miedo me invade de repente.
translations.pt: De repente, o medo me invade.
translations.vi: Nỗi sợ bất chợt ập đến.
translations.hi: अचानक डर मुझे घेर लेता है.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the subject noun 'peur'.
Common noun, singular; subject of the verb.
Verb 'envahit' (present 3rd person singular) with attached clitic object 'm'' (me); the fear is the subject and 'me' is the affected object.
Sentence adverb; modifies the verb to indicate suddenness.

sentences.target: On évite d'envahir l'espace de Sophie.

translations.fr: On évite d'envahir l'espace de Sophie.
translations.es: Evitamos invadir el espacio de Sophie.
translations.de: Wir vermeiden, in Sophies persönlichen Raum einzudringen.
translations.it: Evitiamo di invadere lo spazio di Sophie.
translations.ko: 우리는 소피의 공간을 침범하지 않으려고 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们避免侵占苏菲的空间。
translations.yue: 我哋避免侵佔蘇菲嘅空間。
translations.ru: Мы стараемся не вторгаться в пространство Софи.
translations.pt: Evitamos invadir o espaço da Sophie.
translations.he: אנחנו נמנעים מלפלוש למרחב של סופי.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tránh xâm phạm không gian của Sophie.
translations.nl: We vermijden het om Sophies ruimte binnen te dringen.
translations.uk: Ми уникаємо вторгатися в простір Софі.
translations.hi: हम सोफी की जगह में दखल करने से बचते हैं.
translations.el: Αποφεύγουμε να εισβάλλουμε στον χώρο της Σόφι.
translations.nb: Vi unngår å invadere Sophies plass.
translations.sv: Vi undviker att inkräkta på Sophies utrymme.
translations.da: Vi undgår at invadere Sophies plads.
translations.ja: 私たちはソフィーのスペースに踏み込まないようにしている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; often colloquial for 'we'.
Main verb, present 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Infinitive 'envahir' introduced by elided 'de' (d'); complements 'évite' ('éviter de' + infinitive).
Noun with elided definite article 'l''; direct object of 'envahir'.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement indicating possession/association.
Proper noun; complement of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Tu envahis mon bureau avec tes cartons.
sentences.reading: /ty ɑ̃.va.i mɔ̃ by.ʁo a.vɛk te kaʁ.tɔ̃/

translations.fr: Tu envahis mon bureau avec tes cartons.
translations.ipa: /ty ɑ̃.va.i mɔ̃ by.ʁo a.vɛk te kaʁ.tɔ̃/
translations.en: You're taking over my desk with your boxes.
translations.es: Estás invadiendo mi escritorio con tus cajas.
translations.de: Du nimmst mit deinen Kisten meinen Schreibtisch ein.
translations.it: Stai occupando la mia scrivania con le tue scatole.
translations.ko: 너의 상자들로 내 책상을 차지하고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你用你的箱子占满了我的办公桌。
translations.yue: 你用你啲箱霸晒我張枱。
translations.ru: Ты своими коробками занимаешь весь мой стол.
translations.pt: Você está ocupando minha mesa com suas caixas.
translations.he: אתה משתלט על השולחן שלי עם הארגזים שלך.
translations.vi: Bạn đang để những thùng của mình lấn chiếm bàn làm việc của tôi.
translations.nl: Je neemt mijn bureau in met je dozen.
translations.uk: Ти захоплюєш мій стіл своїми коробками.
translations.hi: तुम अपने डिब्बों से मेरी मेज़ पर कब्जा कर रहे हो.
translations.el: Καταλαμβάνεις το γραφείο μου με τα κουτιά σου.
translations.nb: Du tar over skrivebordet mitt med boksene dine.
translations.id: Kamu mengambil alih meja saya dengan kotak-kotakmu.
translations.sv: Du tar över mitt skrivbord med dina lådor.
translations.ro: Îmi ocupi biroul cu cutiile tale.
translations.da: Du overtager mit skrivebord med dine kasser.
translations.ja: あなたは自分の箱で私の机を占拠している。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present 2nd person singular; agrees with 'Tu'.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'bureau'.
Common noun, singular; direct object of 'envahis'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental/comitative complement.
Possessive determiner, plural; modifies 'cartons'.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'avec'.
